prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约14163→16909→14858→19153→20686，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约5800名；2025年基准约20686名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为17、16、17、9、9人，2025年计划9人；2026年计划大幅增至21人，扩招约133%，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜约第48名（2026年），近年排名稳定在44–53区间，属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价偏正面，硕士报考热度高（ 拟招3100人、报考预估破1.5万），反映该校在教育学领域的高人气；抖音热度一般（总排名第67），未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；马克思主义理论A+、 教育学A+、世界史A+、统计学A、生态学A-、生物学A-，共6个A-及以上学科，师范类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社 会热度分化观望，整体平稳；计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（计算机类、数学类、物理学类等）方向契合；本省2026年物理类考生 约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争基数扩大。；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，属跨省招生；该校在陕西省招 生占比约1.8%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（133%）与考生增加（19.7%）的博弈，扩招效 应显著占优，基准位次大幅后移；但学校声誉偏正面、考生规模扩大及师范类学科优势对报考热度有向上支撑。预测2026年物理类最低位次约34235名，区间33735–34735名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学与应用数学（师范类）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能等）
- 化学（师范类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物科学类（生物科学（师范）、生物技术）
- 物理学类（物理学（师范）、电子信息科学与技术、材料物理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招，预测位次区间33735–34735名，较2025年基准明显后移，报考难度显著降低。建议位次在区间下限（33735名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档的数学类、计 算机类等热门专业；位次在区间中段的考生以二档为主、一档为辅；位次接近区间上限（34735名）的考生以三档保底、二档为主。师范类专业就业稳定，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 14163 → 16909 → 14858 → 19153 → 20686, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5800 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 20686; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 17, 16, 17, 9, and 9 respectively, with 9 places in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 21 places, an expansion of about 133%, greatly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 48th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings between 44 and 53 in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, with high popularity for master's applications (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applications exceeding 15000), reflecting the university's high popularity in the field of education; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 67), with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, totaling 6 A- and above disciplines, with strong teacher-training disciplines, providing strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for teacher-training/education majors is divided and stable overall; computer, electronic information/communication and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer, Mathematics, Physics, etc.); the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 206500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172468 in 2025, expanding the competition base; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi Province is about 1.8% (2025), a moderately low level, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (133%) and the increase in examinees (19.7%), the expansion effect significantly dominates, causing a substantial backward shift in the baseline ranking; however, the university's positive reputation, expanded examinee pool, and advantages in teacher-training disciplines provide upward support for application popularity. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 34235, with a range of 33735–34735.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher-Training)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Chemistry (Teacher-Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Biological Sciences Category (Biological Science (Teacher-Training), Biotechnology)
- Physics Category (Physics (Teacher-Training), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering, Ecology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category sees significant expansion, with a predicted ranking range of 33735–34735, notably lower than the 2025 baseline, greatly reducing application difficulty. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (33735) are advised to focus on Tier 1 majors like Mathematics and Computer; those in the middle range should prioritize Tier 2 with some Tier 1 options; those near the upper limit (34735) should mainly choose Tier 2 with Tier 3 as safety. Teacher-training majors offer stable employment and are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 2140 → 2046 → 1821 → 2736 → 2401, fluctuating within the 1800–2800 range overall. In 2024, there was a notable backward shift, followed by a slight recovery in 2025; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2401. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 8, 10, 9, 7, and 8 students respectively, with 8 planned for 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 14 students, an expansion of about 75%, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 48th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 44–53 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, with high popularity for master's programs (planned enrollment of 3,100, estimated applications exceeding 15,000), reflecting strong popularity in the field of education. Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 67), with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps recorded. Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, highly correlated with History Category enrollment majors (Marxist Theory, Chinese Language and Literature, English, etc.), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of teacher training/education majors is divided and watchful, overall stable; Chinese Language/Literature majors are recommended as relatively popular, Law is recommended as relatively popular. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in this province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, involving cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment share in Shaanxi Province is about 1.8% (2025), a moderately low level, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the 2026 enrollment expansion (75%) versus the increase in examinees (17%), the expansion effect dominates, leading to a backward shift in the baseline ranking. However, the university's positive reputation and strong alignment between advantageous disciplines and enrollment majors provide upward support for application popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 3281, with a range of 2789–3773.

It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (2789) focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training) and English (Teacher Training); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range primarily target Tier 2 Marxist Theory majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (3773) use Tier 3 Economics majors as a safety net. Teacher training majors offer stable employment and are worth prioritizing.
